category_sources: Official Flyscrape README describes it as a command-line web scraping tool.
source_facts.description says it is a standalone and scriptable web scraper.
display_name_sources: Official flyscrape.com documentation and GitHub README use Flyscrape.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to Documentation at flyscrape.com.
Official flyscrape.com/docs is the dedicated Flyscrape documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/philippta/flyscrape, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Flyscrape README lists standalone CLI, JavaScript scripting, and browser mode features.
source_facts.description identifies a scriptable web scraper.
